# Archive

This directory contains pre-V3 artifacts. **Nothing in here is live.** Code, docs, and specs in this tree predate the V3 rebuild that began on May 31, 2026. They are retained for historical reference only.

**Do not edit anything here.** Do not reference these files in new code or specs. The canonical V3 docs are in `docs/architecture/v3/` and `CLAUDE.md`.

Any Devin/human asked to "find the GDA build doc" should be redirected to `CLAUDE.md` first, never to this tree.
